patch.value: MCP pm_run activity defaults to verbose raw history-patch dump (token waste for agents)

Over the pm-mcp server, pm_run action=activity passed options straight through and defaulted compact=false, returning the full activity array with raw JSON Patch ops + before/after hashes per entry (~800 lines for ~18 items in dogfood). runActivity already supports compact mode (returns slim compact_activity and empties the heavy activity array), matching the list/search compact-default pattern.

MCP activity defaults to compact when the caller passes no compact option; callers can still request the full patch stream via options.compact=false; regression test asserts compact-by-default (compact=true, empty activity[], populated compact_activity[]) and verbose opt-out via handleRequest/pm_run.
MCP activity now defaults to compact; full patch stream remains available via options.compact=false.
Agents calling activity get a slim summary by default instead of an ~800-line raw-patch dump.
compact-by-default returns compact=true, empty activity[], populated compact_activity[]; compact=false restores the verbose stream. MCP spec passes 5/5.

Fixed in src/mcp/server.ts: the activity case now injects compact=true when the caller omits a compact option (mirroring list/search). Full patch stream still available via options.compact=false. Regression test added to mcp-dynamic-package-actions.spec.ts; MCP spec passes 5/5. The remaining CLI-default verbosity for pm activity/history (human-facing) and a new history compact mode are tracked separately as follow-up.
